description: Bridge file between aisling_rider (Rider/C++) and aisling_bp (Unreal Editor/Blueprint).

protocol.handoff_rule: Writer appends to their own outbox. Reader consumes and clears after acting. Never overwrite the other surface's array.
protocol.ack_rule: After consuming an entry, receiving surface appends ack entry with status: acknowledged and original entry_id to its own outbox.
protocol.conflict_rule: If both surfaces wrote since last sync, last_writer wins on metadata fields only. Pending arrays are always merged, never clobbered.

pending_for_rider.payload: HND-007 (Diagnostic rebuild + PIE retest) is blocked. The build failed on the diagnostic pass, as noted in HND-SES006-SHUTDOWN. Cannot run PIE until Rider fixes the build in ForemanStateTreeConditions.cpp.
Acknowledged session shutdown due to build failure. Waiting for Rider to fix ForemanStateTreeConditions.cpp.
